info.name: Build Service
info.description:
# Build Service

Base URL: `http://localhost:8087`

Manages PC builds and their items. Supports full CRUD for both builds and build items, including error/edge-case scenarios.

request.description: Retrieves all builds in the system. No filters or pagination applied.
Retrieves a single build by its ID. Returns 404 if not found.
Retrieves all builds belonging to a specific user by user ID.

item.name: Get Build By Id And User Id

request.description: Retrieves a specific build by both build ID and user ID.

Creates a new build for a user. Requires `userId` and `name`.

**Expected:** 201 Created

Negative test -- sends null `userId` and empty `name`.

**Expected:** 400 Bad Request (validation error)

Updates an existing build's name. Requires `userId` and `name`.

**Expected:** 200 OK

Deletes a build by ID.

**Expected:** 204 No Content

Negative test -- tries to delete a non-existent build.

**Expected:** 404 Not Found
Retrieves all items associated with a specific build.
Retrieves a single item from a build by item ID. Returns 404 if not found.

Adds a product item to a build. Requires `productId` and `quantity` (> 0).

**Expected:** 201 Created

Negative test -- sends quantity = 0 (must be > 0).

**Expected:** 400 Bad Request (validation error)

item.name: Create Build Item Build Not Found

request.description:
Negative test -- tries to add an item to a non-existent build.

**Expected:** 404 Not Found

Deletes a specific item from a build.

**Expected:** 204 No Content

Negative test -- tries to delete a non-existent item.

**Expected:** 404 Not Found
Through gateway: Retrieves all builds in the system. No filters or pagination applied.
Through gateway: Retrieves a single build by its ID. Returns 404 if not found.

request.description: Through gateway: Retrieves all builds belonging to a specific user by user ID.

request.description: Through gateway: Retrieves a specific build by both build ID and user ID.

**Expected:** 200 OK

Through gateway: Deletes a build by ID.

item.name: Get Items By Build Id (via gateway)

request.description: Through gateway: Retrieves all items associated with a specific build.
Through gateway: Retrieves a single item from a build by item ID. Returns 404 if not found.

Through gateway: Adds a product item to a build. Requires `productId` and `quantity` (> 0).

**Expected:** 201 Created

request.description:
Through gateway: Negative test -- sends quantity = 0 (must be > 0).

**Expected:** 400 Bad Request (validation error)

Through gateway: Deletes a specific item from a build.
